metadata.title: Kasy — Ship your Flutter app in 7 days
metadata.description: The complete Flutter starter: backend, auth, payments, UI and logic, ready to go. Ship on iOS, Android and Web on day one.

tagline.lead: The Flutter starter that ships on iOS,
tagline.tail: Android and Web on day one.

heroIntro.leadPart1: The only complete Flutter kit: backend, auth, payments, UI and logic, ready to go.
heroIntro.leadPart2: You focus on what makes your app unique.

heroWorkspaceMock.phoneAlt: Kasy's mobile interface, remote control for agents

featureHoverCards.heading: From code to store

appShowcase.heading: Build the next big app.
appShowcase.subtitle: Our kit is more than code, it's a launch platform. See what's possible when you skip the setup.

testimonials.headingPart1: Loved by people who build and ship
testimonials.subtitle: Developers and founders going from idea to the App Store in days, not months.

items.text: I shipped my first app in 6 days. The CLI already had Firebase, auth and payments set up before I even opened the editor.
items.name: Lucas Almeida

items.text: I'm not a developer and I still got a real app into both stores. Kasy guided me through every step.
items.name: Marina Costa

items.text: The browser preview alone saved me hours. No emulator — iOS and Android side by side, right in the browser.
items.name: Diego Fernández

items.text: I migrated a client project to Supabase in minutes. Same code, different backend. Impressive.
items.name: Priya Nair

items.text: RevenueCat, push and analytics all came ready. I just built my features and shipped.
items.name: Tom Becker

items.text: CLI updates without breaking what was already live. No other kit does that.
items.name: Sofia Rossi

items.text: From idea to TestFlight in a week. The component gallery made the UI the easiest part.
items.name: Akira Tanaka

items.text: One stack, three backends. I chose Firebase, the client wanted REST. Zero rewrites.
items.name: Hannah Müller

items.text: The AI editor rules made Cursor feel like it already knew the entire Kasy project.
items.name: Rafael Santos

items.question: Do I need to know how to code to use Kasy?
items.answer: Basic development knowledge helps, but the kit was built to be accessible. With the training, you can build your first app from scratch.

items.question: What's the difference between Kasy and other boilerplates?
items.answer: We deliver the only end-to-end Flutter kit, from technical setup to screen design. Others deliver one or the other. Our CLI also ships updates without breaking the project you already built.

items.question: Can I use the kit on multiple projects?
items.answer: Yes. All plans include unlimited apps.

items.question: What if I already have a project in progress?
items.answer: Kasy is designed for new projects, but components can be copied manually into existing ones.

items.question: What happens when my annual access expires?
items.answer: You can renew or upgrade to lifetime access. Your app keeps working. You just stop receiving updates.

items.question: Which platforms does the app run on?
items.answer: iOS, Android and Web. Linux and Windows support is coming soon.

items.question: What is the training?
items.answer: A hands-on course for non-developers that teaches you to build a complete app in 7 days using Kasy and AI tools like Cursor and Claude Code.

items.question: Can I sell the apps I build with the kit?
items.answer: Yes. The license is commercial on all plans.

items.question: Can I get a refund?
items.answer: Once you have access to the kit, Kasy is yours forever. Because of that, purchases are non-refundable. Have questions? Ask before you buy — we're happy to help. On average, Kasy users ship their app in 7 days.

pricing.heading: Choose your plan and start building
pricing.subtitle: International cards accepted via Stripe. Access unlocked immediately after payment confirmation.
pricing.checkoutNote: Secure checkout via Stripe. Instant access after confirmation.

features: From idea to published app in 7 days

success.heading: Welcome to Kasy
success.body: We sent your activation key by email. Install the CLI with npm install -g kasy-cli and run kasy new when you're ready.
